_status: DOCTRINE RATIFIED 2026-07-18 (owner: Jeff Phillips); rule entries are deployment content - an empty table is fail-closed by structure (nothing matches, so nothing moves without signed authority)
_purpose: Reserve-setting rules the records lane may cite
_doctrine: ZERO-THRESHOLD RULE (ratified 2026-07-18, permeates all identity blueprints): entries matching a loaded, ratified rule apply automatically with the rule citation; ANY other payment, reserve change, or recovery action, ANY amount, moves only on signed human authority (payment.authority / reserve.authority / recovery.authority). No dollar threshold, no de-minimis lane. Books reconciliation tolerance is $0.00 - any variance is reconciliation.exception to the human; 'close enough' is the named breach.
